fonttheme func New(base fyne.Theme, opts ...Option) fyne.Theme
fonttheme func WithFonts(f Fonts) Option
fonttheme type Fonts struct { Bold fyne.Resource; BoldItalic fyne.Resource; Italic fyne.Resource; Mono fyne.Resource; MonoBold fyne.Resource; Regular fyne.Resource }
fonttheme type Option func(*Fonts)
fonttheme var MonoBold
fonttheme var MonoRegular
fonttheme var SansBold
fonttheme var SansBoldItalic
fonttheme var SansItalic
fonttheme var SansRegular
prettyview const AutoFormatOff
prettyview const AutoFormatOnBlur
prettyview const AutoFormatOnPause
prettyview const FormatAuto = model.FormatAuto
prettyview const FormatHTML = model.FormatHTML
prettyview const FormatJSON = model.FormatJSON
prettyview const FormatJSONC = model.FormatJSONC
prettyview const FormatRaw = model.FormatRaw
prettyview const FormatXML = model.FormatXML
prettyview const SearchPlain SearchMode = iota
prettyview const SearchRegex
prettyview const WrapNone WrapMode = iota
prettyview const WrapWord
prettyview func DefaultToolbarConfig(win fyne.Window) ToolbarConfig
prettyview func New(opts ...Option) *PrettyView
prettyview func NewFoldButtons(pv *PrettyView) fyne.CanvasObject
prettyview func NewFormatSelect(pv *PrettyView) fyne.CanvasObject
prettyview func NewSearchBar(pv *PrettyView) fyne.CanvasObject
prettyview func NewToolbar(pv *PrettyView, cfg ToolbarConfig) fyne.CanvasObject
prettyview func NewWithData(src []byte, format Format, opts ...Option) *PrettyView
prettyview func NewWrapToggle(pv *PrettyView) fyne.CanvasObject
prettyview func ShowOpenDialog(pv *PrettyView, win fyne.Window)
prettyview func WithDefaultCollapseDepth(d int) Option
prettyview func WithEditable() Option
prettyview func WithFormat(f Format) Option
prettyview func WithIndentStep(px float32) Option
prettyview func WithInputConfig(c InputConfig) Option
prettyview func WithLineNumbers() Option
prettyview func WithMaxInputBytes(n int) Option
prettyview func WithSearchConfig(s SearchConfig) Option
prettyview func WithSyntaxColors(v fyne.ThemeVariant, s SyntaxColors) Option
prettyview func WithTabWidth(n int) Option
prettyview func WithTheme(v fyne.ThemeVariant, t Theme) Option
prettyview func WithUndoLimit(n int) Option
prettyview func WithWrap(m WrapMode) Option
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ClearSearch()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ClearSelection()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) CollapseAll()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) CollapseToDepth(depth int)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) CopySelection()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) CopySubtree(byteOffset int) bool
prettyview method (*PrettyView) CreateRenderer() fyne.WidgetRenderer
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Cursor() desktop.Cursor
prettyview method (*PrettyView) DragEnd()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Dragged(ev *fyne.DragEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Editable() bool
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ExpandAll()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ExpandTo(off int) bool
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ExpandToDepth(depth int)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) FocusGained()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) FocusLost()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Format() Format
prettyview method (*PrettyView) KeyDown(key *fyne.KeyEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) KeyUp(key *fyne.KeyEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Matches() []Match
prettyview method (*PrettyView) MouseDown(ev *desktop.MouseEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) MouseIn(*desktop.MouseEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) MouseMoved(ev *desktop.MouseEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) MouseOut()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) MouseUp(*desktop.MouseEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Redo()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Reformat()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Reparse(format Format)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ScrollOffset() fyne.Position
prettyview method (*PrettyView) ScrollToLine(line int) bool
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Search(q SearchQuery)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SearchDebounced(q SearchQuery)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SearchError() error
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SearchNext()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SearchPrev()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SearchStatus() (active, total int, capped bool)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SelectAll()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SelectedText() string
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetData(src []byte, format Format)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetDefaultCollapseDepth(depth int)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetInputConfig(c InputConfig)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetOnChanged(fn func(string))
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetOnDataChanged(fn func())
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetOnSearchChanged(fn func())
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetOnSearchRequested(fn func())
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetScrollOffset(p fyne.Position)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetSyntaxColors(variant fyne.ThemeVariant, c SyntaxColors)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetText(s string)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetTheme(variant fyne.ThemeVariant, t Theme)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) SetWrap(mode WrapMode)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Source() []byte
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Tapped(e *fyne.PointEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) TappedSecondary(e *fyne.PointEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) TypedKey(ev *fyne.KeyEvent)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) TypedRune(r rune)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) TypedShortcut(s fyne.Shortcut)
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Undo()
prettyview method (*PrettyView) Wrap() WrapMode
prettyview type AutoFormatMode uint8
prettyview type Format = model.Format
prettyview type InputConfig struct { AutoFormat AutoFormatMode; DebounceFor time.Duration }
prettyview type Match struct { ColEnd int; ColStart int; Line int }
prettyview type Option func(*config)
prettyview type PrettyView struct { embeds widget.BaseWidget }
prettyview type SearchConfig struct { DebounceFor time.Duration; MaxMatches int; MinQueryLen int }
prettyview type SearchMode uint8
prettyview type SearchQuery struct { CaseSensitive bool; Mode SearchMode; Text string }
prettyview type SyntaxColors struct { Attr color.Color; Bool color.Color; Comment color.Color; Key color.Color; Null color.Color; Number color.Color; Punct color.Color; String color.Color; Tag color.Color }
prettyview type Theme struct { ActiveMatch color.Color; Attr color.Color; Bool color.Color; Comment color.Color; Foreground color.Color; IndentGuide color.Color; Key color.Color; Match color.Color; Null color.Color; Number color.Color; Punct color.Color; Selection color.Color; String color.Color; Summary color.Color; Tag color.Color }
prettyview type ToolbarConfig struct { OnOpen func(); ShowExpandCollapse bool; ShowFormat bool; ShowOpen bool; ShowSearch bool; ShowWrap bool; Window fyne.Window }
prettyview type WrapMode uint8
